project_type: Full-stack AI productivity app: FastAPI backend + Next.js 15 frontend
build_command: cd /projects/sandbox/ChronAI/backend && python -c 'import app.main' && cd /projects/sandbox/ChronAI/frontend && pnpm build
verification_instructions: 1. Backend import check: cd backend && python -c 'import app.main'. 2. Backend tests: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/ -v (75 tests must pass). 3. Frontend build: cd frontend && pnpm build (must succeed).
setup_instructions: Backend deps pre-installed. Frontend: pnpm install already done (node_modules present).
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Python 3.11 via pyenv, Node 22 via nvm, pnpm available.
contribution_requirements: No explicit CONTRIBUTING.md. Follow existing patterns. Commit changes but do NOT push.
key_patterns: Backend: Pydantic models in db/models.py, repositories in db/repositories.py, agents extend AgentBase in agents/base.py with generate() helper for Gemini calls. Auth via verify_google_token(token) -> dict with sub/email/name. No api/ directory exists yet - routers are on main.py directly. Tests mock Firestore via conftest.py MockFirestoreClient, mock vertexai via mock_vertexai_model fixture. Frontend: Next.js App Router, useSession() for auth, lib/api.ts for REST helpers with getApiBase(), Framer Motion for animations, TailwindCSS for styling.
directory_structure: ChronAI/ -> backend/ (FastAPI app in app/, tests in tests/), frontend/ (Next.js App Router in app/, components/, hooks/, lib/), mcp-servers/ (calendar/tasks/gmail), shared/ (schemas), docs/
